raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and behavioral commitment declaration",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker has previously suppressed bodily aliveness, energy, pleasure, creativity, or expression",
    "suppression has been motivated by fear and a desire to keep others comfortable",
    "it is currently safe to stop suppressing and to expand",
    "expansion and expression will produce positive outcomes without significant risk"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; each clause reinforces a consistent theme of releasing self-limitation in favor of embodied expansion",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker possesses sufficient self-awareness and environmental safety for the intended changes, and the statements function as realistic, actionable reminders rather than denial of actual constraints",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statements are used to override legitimate safety signals, trauma responses, or external boundaries, or are treated as factual descriptions rather than aspirational commitments"
}
